title: lupinus latifolius subsp. latifolius
intro: Lupinus latifolius subsp. latifolius, also known as the purple sage lupine, is a perennial plant species in the legume family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues due to its high alkaloid content. The health benefits associated with Lupinus latifolius subsp. latifolius include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Lupinus latifolius subsp. latifolius can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
